creator: frankch@waru.life.nthu.edu.tw
text:
The master site for ports/biology/seaview has changed.
	This caused an unfetchable distfile. 
	Also the distfile is changed without a version number 
	bounce. The MD5 of the distfile has been updated accordingly.
	There is no official version number for seaview, in this case
        I don't see a reason to change the pkgname.

Fix: The patched is attached below:
